description: Adapter-neutral Attestor crypto execution admission conformance fixtures for external wallets, guards, bundlers, payment servers, custody engines, and solvers.

fixtures.scenario: Wallet call bundle is admitted after capability and permission evidence is present.

steps.message: Conformance fixture binds Attestor release authorization before downstream execution.
External integrator must honor the admitted, blocked, or missing-evidence decision.
External integrator records the signed admission receipt for audit and replay protection.

externalIntegratorAssertions: MUST NOT submit downstream execution when plan.outcome is deny.
MUST collect the missing evidence and rerun admission when plan.outcome is needs-evidence.
MUST bind telemetry subject planId and planDigest to the admission plan before emitting telemetry.
MUST verify the signed admission receipt with the fixture signer before treating the fixture as passed.
MUST preserve the fixture surface and adapterKind across the downstream handoff.
